creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm afraid that ports r369133 was incomplete: it didn't set ZIP_CMD (which was in the original patch by Dominik) and forgot to actually pull run-time dependency on `archivers/zip' as FreeBSD does not provide native zip(1) program (cf. https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=4eb82883317e97c3851e041c415fca854bf062fc).
